body:
{
  "url": "https://api.robinhood.com/accounts/",
  "method": "GET",
  "risk": "sensitive-read",
  "host": "api.robinhood.com",
  "categories": [
    "account"
  ],
  "missingParams": [],
  "warnings": [
    "Sensitive read route. Redact account identifiers, positions, documents, and tax data in shared artifacts."
  ],
  "command": "curl -sS -X GET \"https://api.robinhood.com/accounts/\" -H \"Authorization: Bearer $ROBINHOOD_BROKERAGE_TOKEN\"",
  "mode": "dry_run",
  "mutatesAccount": false,
  "requiresAuth": true
}
